listings.title: Musical Fidelity M1 Digital Analog Converter DAC 24 Bit
listings.body: Multistandard 24 Bit Digital to Analog converter DAC architecture 24 bit Delta-Sigma (Bitstream) 8x oversampling Sampling frequencies 32kHz, 44.1kHz, 48kHz, 88.2kHz and 96kHz Data types Supports 16, 18, 20 and 24 bit word length Inputs Input 1: 75Ω S/PDIF coaxial or TOSLINK optical Input 2: 75Ω S/PDIF coaxial. Outputs Left and Right analog audio 75Ω S/PDIF digital recording/loop out Frequency response 10Hz - 20kHz + 0.2dB S/N ratio > 96dB unweighted > 105dB 'A' weighted THD < 0.006% 10Hz - 20kHz unweighted < 0.003% 10Hz - 20 kHz 'A' weighted De-emphasis < + 0.1dB error, automatically selects correct curve for 32kHz, 44.1kHz or 48kHz Linearity < + 0.3dB to -100dB CALL OR TEXT show contact info

listings.title: Portable AC LG
listings.body: Excellent condition Window kit included. Cash only . Must pick up

listings.title: Antique fans
OK Industries SA-10-115 Tri-Temp Soldering System Iron
listings.body: The OK Industries Solder Aid Tri-Temp Soldering System (Model SA-10-115) is a vintage, production-grade benchtop soldering station that was widely used in electronics manufacturing and repair shops. OK Industries (which later became part of OK International / Metcal) designed this system as a reliable tool for high-precision PCB assembly and rework Input Voltage: 115 VAC, standard North American wall power. Temperature Control: The "Tri-Temp" designation indicates that the station utilizes a multi-position switch allowing the user to select between three pre-set, optimized temperatures (typically mapped to common low, medium, and high thresholds for various solder alloys) Isolation & Safety: Features a 28VAC isolated output to the soldering iron handle to protect static-sensitive CMOS components from electrical leakage and voltage spikes. Replacement Tips: Standard replacement tips for the SA-10 series (such as the 68-TX-406 or SAT-310 series) are still actively cataloged by specialty electronicsSold as shown, and functions as designed. CALL OR TEXT show contact info

listings.title: Aoyue Int. 937+ Solder Station & Iron
listings.body: This is an Aoyue Int. 937+ soldering station, a 45-watt ESD-safe tool featuring digital temperature control. It includes a microprocessor- controlled unit with a digital display and a separate iron stand with iron. The system is designed to use with different interchangeable tips compatible with standard 900M series tips Power consumption: 45 w Output voltage: 24v Temp range: 392F to 896F Temp control Discreet push button Tested and performed as designed. CALL OR TEXT show contact info

listings.title: (2) Fisher 30a Tube Mono Amplifier Restored "Time Machines!”
listings.body: The Fisher 30-A is a vintage vacuum-tube monoblock power amplifier originally manufactured in the late 1950s and 1960s, often used in large console stereos. Known for its warm tone and highly regarded output transformers, it delivers 12 watts of conservatively rated power with exceptionally low distortion. Fisher 30A Tube Monoblock Amplifier (Vintage Audio) Power: ~12 Watts per channel. Distortion (THD): Less than 1%. Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR): Around 97dB. Type: Tube monoblock, often used in consoles. Amplifier Serial 34040: 1 X ECC83 / 12AX7 (Audio Amplifier / Phase Inverter) Lafayette 2 X EL84 / 6BQ5 (Push-Pull Output) Matsushita 1 X  EZ81 / 6CA4 (Rectifier) Siemens Amplifier Serial 39546: 1 X ECC83 / 12AX7 (Audio Amplifier / Phase Inverter) GE 2 X EL84 / 6BQ5 (Push-Pull Output) Valvo 1 X  EZ81 / 6CA4 (Rectifier) Telefunken Power Requirements: 105 - 125 Volts AC, 60 Cycles Power Consumption: 62 Watts (0.63 Amp at 117V AC CALL OR TEXT show contact info

listings.title: IRIN Electric guitar
listings.body: Budget guitar with a solid build. Definitely catches the eye. Used with a student band and now it needs a new home.

listings.title: Ibanez GIO mikro short scale guitar
listings.body: “The Ibanez MiKro Series guitar is a perfect choice for any budding guitarist looking for an inexpensive electric guitar built for smaller hands and shorter arms. This undersized axe doesn't just look cool with its exciting colors and unmistakable RG body style, but it also plays the part. The GRGM21M sports a pair of Infinity R humbuckers, which give you thick and punchy tone that's perfect for rock and metal. A thin, short-scale neck and medium-gauge frets ensure that anyone will enjoy playing the Ibanez MiKro.” Good shape. A bit dusty, but ready to rock!! Used it for a student band. Now it needs a good home.
